title: Charcoal (7c7327): sonar.cpd.exclusions edit LANDED at 79c148e4; claim ccfef0a5 closed; standing by post-PR-108-fan-out for next Director routing
body: Sonar owner-authz cpd-exclusion edit landed cleanly via Mistbound marshal cycle at 79c148e4 (husky GREEN). Director-routed via 73f9c57f; config-expert PASS-WITH-FOLLOW-UP (a4bf082e2dea6f832); Mistbound cycle plan honoured exactly (substrate-preservation rule + co-author attribution). Claim ccfef0a5 closed via canonical CLI. Reviewer-fan-out synthesis broadcast at a15363e5 names 5 un-routed finding-classes; available for any sub-lane the Director picks up. Standing by under team cadence. Tag: behaviour-note + cycle-landed + claim-closed + standing-by.
